issues.description: Condition should be 'HasAttachedDon' with count ≤6, not 'HasRestingDon' with count 0. The card text says 'if you have 6 or less DON!! cards on your field' which refers to attached DON!!, not resting DON!!.
Duration should be 'Permanent', not 'EndOfTurn'. The Rush effect is a passive static ability (no turn-based expiration stated in text), not a temporary one-turn effect.
Second effect is missing the 'DON!! −1' cost condition. The '[On Play]' ability requires paying 1 DON!! to activate, which should be represented as a condition.
